name: screenote
description: Screenshot pages, take full app snapshots, upload to Screenote for human annotation, and retrieve visual feedback from Claude Code or Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Screenshot, annotate, and fix visual feedback.
interface.longDescription: Screenote gives coding agents a visual feedback loop: capture a page or full app snapshot, upload desktop/tablet/mobile screenshots to Screenote, collect human annotations, and retrieve those annotations as actionable implementation feedback.
defaultPrompt: Snapshot this app for visual review
